content.problemStatement:
Chef is given two integers N,SN, SN,S.

Consider an array AAA of size NNN such that A[i]=iA[i]=iA[i]=i for every 1≤i≤N1 \leq i \leq N1≤i≤N.

You are required to find any position x(1≤x≤N)x(1\leq x \leq N)x(1≤x≤N) such that :

(A[1]+A[2]+...A[x−1])+(A[x+1]+A[x+2]+...A[N])=S(A[1]+A[2]+...A[x-1]) + (A[x+1]+A[x+2]+...A[N]) = S(A[1]+A[2]+...A[x−1])+(A[x+1]+A[x+2]+...A[N])=S

If there are multiple such positions xxx, print any such position. If there is no such position, print −1-1−1.


Input Format

First line will contain TTT, number of testcases. Then the testcases follow.
Each testcase contains of a single line of input, two integers N,SN, SN,S.


Output Format
For each testcase, output the required position or −1-1−1 in case there is no such position.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 111: A[1]+A[3]+A[4]=1+3+4=8A[1]+A[3]+A[4]=1+3+4=8A[1]+A[3]+A[4]=1+3+4=8, so x=2x=2x=2 is a suitable position.
Test Case 333: There is no suitable position.
